funFacts: Quetzalcoatlus soaring over Volcanoes was named after Quetzalcoatl, the feathered serpent god of Aztec mythology.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing intricate color highlighting using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about advanced mechanical structure and shapes while developing fine motor coordination.
